the-toynbee-tiles.note: No single discovery date exists (tiles appeared gradually through the 1980s); using the Sundance premiere of Resurrect Dead, the documentary that brought the case to wide attention, Jan 24 2011

the-cottingley-fairies.note: First two photos taken July 1917; exact day not recorded. Since this was already a placeholder day within the right month, shifted from the 1st to the 13th to sit a full week from Tunguska instead of 1 day, and to fill the wide Guidestones-to-Beale gap

this-man.note: Site went viral in October 2009; exact day not commonly documented. Since this was already a placeholder day within the right month, shifted from the 15th to the 5th to sit a week from Iron Mountain instead of 1 day, and to fill the wide Skinwalker-to-11B-X-1371 gap

marble-hornets.note: First video uploaded to YouTube, June 20 2009

ted-s-caving-page.note: Site's own 'Updated 5/19/01' timestamp, the last confirmed update to the original Angelfire page

petscop.note: Moved from the first upload (March 12 2017, which sat 1 day from Phoenix Lights) to the actual final episode date, Sept 2 2019 -- both are real, equally defensible anchor points, and this one spreads the calendar better

the-wyoming-incident.note: Sources disagree on the exact origin -- some cite 2006 on Google Video, others a Sept 10 2007 post by jonrev. The entry itself now acknowledges this ambiguity rather than asserting a single date; kept Sept 10 as the anchor point since it's the more specifically documented claim

sad-satan.note: Obscure Horror Corner's first upload, June 25 2015

the-hexham-heads.note: Discovered 'in 1971,' generally cited as early in the year; exact day not documented. Shifted from Feb 21 to fill the gap left between Dyatlov and Phoenix Lights after Petscop moved

the-georgia-guidestones.note: Destroyed by explosion, July 6 2022 -- chosen over the 1980 dedication since it's the more specific, verifiable, and consequential date

the-voynich-manuscript.note: No single 'event' date exists for a centuries-old manuscript; using an approximate placeholder in the Beinecke Library era rather than the disputed 1912 Voynich acquisition date

the-watcher-of-westfield.note: First letter arrived 'shortly after closing' in June 2014; exact day not publicly documented

the-circleville-letters.note: Ron Gillispie's fatal crash after the phone call, Aug 19 1977

project-mkultra.note: The 1977 Senate joint hearing, Aug 3 1977 -- chosen over the vaguer 1953 program start since it's the day the program actually became public

skinwalker-ranch-and-the-pentagon-s-secr.note: Claims first appeared in the Deseret News in 1996; exact publication day not confirmed

the-beale-ciphers.note: The Beale Papers pamphlet published in 1885; exact day not commonly documented

the-doodler.note: First known victim, Gerald Cavanaugh, found Jan 27 1974

overtoun-bridge.note: No single anchoring date exists for an ongoing phenomenon reported since the 1950s -- since this was a placeholder with no real anchor at all, moved here specifically to fill the wide gap between the Lost Experience and Ted's Caving Page

spring-heeled-jack.note: The Jane Alsop attack, one of the best-documented incidents, Feb 19 1838

the-bloop.note: Recorded 'in the summer of 1997'; exact day not publicly documented

11b-x-1371-the-plague-doctor-video.note: Video circulated under this title from mid-October 2015; the earliest upload under a different title was in May 2015

the-taos-hum.note: Congressional-referenced investigation dates to 1993; no single documented day

operation-mincemeat.note: Body released into the sea off Huelva, April 30 1943

112-ocean-avenue.note: The DeFeo murders, Nov 13 1974 -- chosen over the Lutz haunting (Dec 1975) since it's the origin event

kim-philby.note: The BBC's 2016 broadcast of the previously-unseen 1981 Stasi lecture footage -- chosen over the disputed exact day of Philby's 1963 defection from Beirut, which sources give inconsistently

peoples-temple.note: Deliberately anchored to the Nov 4 1978 State Department telegram arranging Ryan's visit -- not Nov 18, the date of the deaths -- consistent with this entry's framing around the paper trail rather than the tragedy itself
